title: Instead of OSIG — python study, half-marathon training, Viktor Frankl (April 12 2022 redirect)
html:
TL;DR

  • April 12, 2022 three-line redirect titled "Instead of OSIG:" — Yahir mapping out what he'll do if he doesn't get into OSIG: Python study, half-marathon training, Viktor Frankl.
  • The plan-B is structurally revealing: technical skill (Python), physical discipline (half marathon), philosophical anchor (Frankl / Man's Search for Meaning) — three orthogonal axes, no consolation prize.
  • Sits 5 weeks after the "start OSIG process" note and 2 weeks before the self curriculum workbook — the OSIG application was clearly in flight and uncertain enough that Yahir was pre-grieving the rejection.
  • The Python line is the earliest in-vault evidence Yahir was thinking about programming as a serious investment, predating the formal CS-major switch's full effect — pairs with the four year CS plan line from two weeks earlier.
  • Frankl is a one-mention here but recurs across Yahir's voluntary adversity / soul as beacon cluster — promote to entity stub on next mention.

Key fragment

"Python Study / Half Marathon Training / Victor frankl"

Why it matters

This note is the inverted version of the OSIG dream. Yahir doesn't list "apply to other clubs" or "more business classes." He lists three things that look like a stripped-down identity floor: a skill, a body discipline, a meaning-source. That triple — competence / body / meaning — recurs in 2024–2026 as the fitfo + supplement stack + soul as beacon frame. Read this note as the first articulation of Yahir's plan-B identity stack, which eventually became his plan-A.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir get into OSIG that spring or have to wait until fall? (The fall-2022 OSIG notes suggest he eventually got in.)
  • Did he run the half marathon?
  • Is this the first explicit mention of Frankl in the corpus?
